subject: [PATCH v2 09/28] nfsd: add protocol support for CB_NOTIFY

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds support for the CB_NOTIFY protocol in the nfsd kernel module. It updates the xdr (external data representation) files to include the necessary definitions and removes duplicate definitions from other headers. The patch also regenerates the xdr files, which caused conflicts with existing definitions of NFS4_VERIFIER_SIZE and NFS4_FHSIZE. These constants are now removed from the kernel API and userspace consumers should obtain them from more authoritative sources.
